title: Password Reset Loop
description: User receives reset email but link redirects to 404 page.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Data visualization widgets take 10s+ to render for large datasets.

title: Bulk Export Failure
description: CSV export crashes when selecting more than 5,000 rows.

title: Dark Mode Request
description: Client requesting native dark mode for the mobile application.

title: Billing Discrepancy
description: Monthly invoice shows incorrect seat count for March.

title: API Timeout (Error 504)
description: Integration endpoint timing out during peak hours (10 AM - 12 PM).

title: Broken Image Links
description: Profile pictures in the team directory are not loading.

title: Two-Factor Auth Issue
description: SMS codes are arriving 15 minutes late for international users.

title: Typo in User Guide
description: Word 'Schedule' is misspelled as 'Shedul' in the PDF documentation.

title: Feature: Slack Bot
description: Requesting a webhook-based notification system for Slack.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: App closes instantly upon opening the 'Reports' tab on Android.

title: GDPR Deletion Request
description: User requested full account and data deletion per privacy laws.
